channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Durban July Celebrates Wild West Mzansi-Style Fashion with Celebrities
item.description: The Durban July event transformed Greyville Racecourse into a Wild West-themed celebration, drawing over 40,000 attendees. Celebrities and fashionistas showcased cowboy-inspired outfits, including Ste...

item.title: Fisherfolk commemorate 10th anniversary of WPS arbitral victory with sea action
item.description: On July 5, 2026, approximately 250 fisherfolk from Zambales staged a symbolic sea action to mark the start of a week-long commemoration of the Philippines' landmark 2016 arbitral victory over China's ...

item.title: Philippine archers secure 9 gold medals at Singapore Youth Archery Championships
item.description: Philippine archers made a significant mark in the Singapore Youth Archery Championships, clinching 9 gold medals to showcase their prowess in the sport. The achievement highlights the growing competit...

item.title: US-Iran technical talks to resume in Islamabad amid ongoing tensions
item.description: The article discusses the resumption of technical negotiations between the United States and Iran, with Islamabad emerging as the likely venue for the next round of talks scheduled for July 11. The di...

item.title: Xenophobic Attacks in South Africa Result in Deaths of Two Nigerians
item.description: The Nigerian Consulate in South Africa has confirmed the deaths of two Nigerian citizens due to xenophobic violence, bringing the total number of fatalities linked to such attacks to at least seven. T...

item.title: Paul Pelosi Accused of Hit-and-Run in Napa County Crash
item.description: Former U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi's husband, Paul Pelosi, faces potential criminal charges after allegedly causing a hit-and-run crash in Napa County. According to the Napa County Sheriff’s Offic...

item.title: Fort Simpson Wildfire Causes Damage to Outbuildings, No Homes Lost
item.description: A wildfire near Fort Simpson, N.W.T., has caused damage to some outbuildings like sheds and fences but no primary residential structures were destroyed, according to officials. Wildland urban interfac...

item.title: Afghan diaspora in Canberra calls for support and cultural recognition after embassy closure
item.description: The closure of Afghanistan’s embassy in Canberra has deeply affected members of Australia’s Afghan community, particularly women who fled the country after the Taliban takeover. For many, including re...

item.title: Government Directs Telegram to Remove Pirated Content Amid Legal Concerns
item.description: The Union government has directed messaging app Telegram to remove pirated films and copyrighted material from its platform within 15 days, threatening legal action under the IT Act and IT Rules if no...

item.title: AFP encourages more local governments to institutionalize July 12 as West Philippine Sea Victory Day
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) is calling on more local government units (LGUs) across the country to officially declare July 12 as 'West Philippine Sea Victory Day' in commemoration of the...

item.title: PM Modi highlights India's refining capacity and energy security amid global crises
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi emphasized India's ability to overcome the energy crisis caused by the West Asia conflict, attributing it to the nation's expansion in refining capacity. He highlighted th...

item.title: JD Vance Republishes 2016 Op-Ed Criticizing Trump Amid Political Shifts
item.description: The Atlantic republished JD Vance's 2016 op-ed, 'Opioid of the Masses,' which sharply criticized then-GOP presidential candidate Donald Trump. The piece compared Trump's MAGA politics to heroin, argui...

item.title: Trump watches his own Fox News broadcast without waving as hosts plead with him
item.description: A surreal and politically charged moment unfolded during a live Fox News broadcast on July 4, 2026, when President Donald Trump was captured on camera watching the same network's coverage of himself. ...

item.title: Bob Vylan takes legal action against BBC over Glastonbury performance comments
item.description: Australian punk-rap duo Bob Vylan has announced legal action against the BBC following controversy over their Glastonbury performance last summer. Singer Bobby Vylan led chants of 'death to the IDF' d...

item.title: FCMB Reports Record Profits and Pays Dividend to Shareholders
item.description: FCMB Group Plc shareholders approved a N23.08bn dividend payout for the 2025 financial year following robust profit growth. The decision was made at the company's annual general meeting, where they al...

item.title: Canada's Historic World Cup Run Ends with 3-0 Loss to Morocco
item.description: Canada's men's soccer team concluded their historic World Cup journey with a 3-0 defeat to Morocco, marking the end of their Round of 16 campaign. Despite the loss, the team's achievements throughout ...

item.title: Springboks dominate England 45-21 in Nations Championship opener
item.description: The Springboks delivered a commanding performance in their opening Test of the Nations Championship, defeating England 45-21 at Ellis Park. The victory showcased physical dominance, attacking flair, a...

item.title: Paul Pelosi Faces Criminal Charges Over Vehicle Incident in Northern California
item.description: Paul Pelosi, the husband of Democratic Representative Nancy Pelosi, is under investigation for allegedly leaving the scene of a car accident in Northern California. According to a report by The New Yo...

item.title: The Significance of EDSA: A Historical Reflection
item.description: The article explores the historical and cultural significance of EDSA (Epifanio de los Santos Avenue), a landmark in Philippine history associated with major events like the People Power Revolution. F...

item.title: TANA: A New Boutique Development in Lyneham Balancing Space and Easy Living
item.description: TANA, a new boutique development in Lyneham, offers a unique blend of house-like proportions and apartment convenience. Comprising 11 residences, the project provides four bedrooms, three bathrooms, a...
